title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 452.180 - Circuit court may make decree
text:
452.180.  Circuit court may make decree. — The circuit court, on due proof of such facts, may, in its discretion, make such order and decree in the premises as shall give such married person the sole use and benefit of such real estate, or such part thereof as it may think reasonable.
(RSMo 1939 § 3387, A.L. 2001 H.B. 537) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3000; 1919 § 7325; 1909 § 8306
